texto: to Vaneigem and the Situationists who by shrewd use of collage and juxtaposition exposed both the poverty and richness of slogans, and the thinly veiled hypocrisy of a "spectacular" society which by not respecting words abuses people, and by insulting the intelligence creates a state of political cretinisation in which the many and various forms of authoritarian control dominate.
explicacao: Citação de Alexis Lykiard sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “to Vaneigem and the Situationists who by shrewd use of collage and juxtaposition exposed both the…” articula inteligencia, authoritarianism, control em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como control e rebellion.
